name: crypt-biome-toolkit
description: TypeScript toolkit for slicing and preparing a 12x12 isometric crypt biome tileset

scripts.pipeline: npm run build && node dist/index.js pipeline
scripts.slice: npm run build && node dist/index.js slice
scripts.tmx: npm run build && node dist/index.js tmx
scripts.rules: npm run build && node dist/index.js rules
scripts.variants: npm run build && node dist/index.js variants
scripts.dungeon: npm run build && node dist/index.js dungeon
